inline_comments.message:
Method generateUUID(msoLogger) did 2 things:
- generateUUID
- log this new UUID

Method getUUID() does not leave any log trace - so this is change in semantic. I think adding log.debug() with new UUID in this place would be right - especially as logger is already available.
Something like (based on original implementation of generateUUID()):
logger.info("{} {}", MessageEnum.APIH_GENERATED_REQUEST_ID, nodeTemplateUUID)
